verse_text: Then the Lord said to him, 'Arise and go into the city, and you will be told what you must do.' And the men who journeyed with him stood speechless, hearing a voice but seeing no one.

links.context: "Oh what a spoil did the Church take from the mouth of the devil, when, by converting, she carried off Saul himself, the spoiler!" (GrgGt; see [[ACT.9:1]]-12).
